problem id: 262e9faf
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) OR SHR(6) OR NOT ROT(3)

examples:
  00001100 -> 10011111
  11101010 -> 10101011
  10011101 -> 10010011
  01110001 -> 11110101
  01000100 -> 11011101
  00010111 -> 11000111
  01100110 -> 11001101
  10110110 -> 01001010
  00011110 -> 00001111

query: 00011100
predicted answer: 00011111
